org.episteme.social.architecture.SustainableMaterialOptimizer.MaterialData

Package
Description
org.episteme.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.

  • Uses of SustainableMaterialOptimizer.MaterialData in org.episteme.social.architecture

    Methods in org.episteme.social.architecture that return SustainableMaterialOptimizer.MaterialData
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static SustainableMaterialOptimizer.MaterialData
    SustainableMaterialOptimizer.findOptimalMaterial(List<SustainableMaterialOptimizer.MaterialData> materials, double volumeM3, double carbonWeight)
    Selects the optimal material from a list of candidates by balancing environmental impact (carbon) against project budget (cost).

    Method
    Description
    static Real
    SustainableMaterialOptimizer.calculateCarbonFootprint(SustainableMaterialOptimizer.MaterialData data, double volumeM3)
    Calculates the total embodied carbon footprint (in kg CO2) for a given volume of material.
